productDisplayName: Sher Singh Women India White Polo T-shirt
description: White polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a broad navy blue diagonal stripe on front, golden batsman logo on left chest, sher singh logo on right chest, navy blue collar with front buttoned placket, Indian tri-colour on underside of collar, bold navy appliqué d #1, orange embroidered text of  'INDIA', embroidered national flag below 'IND' and short sleeves with navy-blue trim
